detaileddescription.para: This function must be called before other functions of the driver are called.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XScuTimer instance.
points to the XScuTimer configuration structure.
is the base address for the device. It could be a virtual address if address translation is supported in the system, otherwise it is the physical address.

listitem.para: XST_DEVICE_IS_STARTED if the device has already been started.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XScuTimer instance.
is a pointer to the XScuTimer instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the prescaler bits in the timer control register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XScuTimer instance.
is a 8 bit value that sets the prescaler to use.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the current prescaler value.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XScuTimer instance.
